pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this repository using the Artifactory REST API.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which downloads this real JAR from Maven Central and deploys it to the exact specified path inside the target repository.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and setup_artifactory.sh which verify the existence of this default Artifactory repository.

privileged_info_summary: The target repository to be deleted is 'helix-staging-local', which is initialized during setup. The repository contains a single file, 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar', deployed at the path 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar'. The environment also contains a default repository named 'example-repo-local' which must remain intact.
